description: Pixel-accurate Figma frames via Figma MCP generate_figma_design + Expo Web. Run: npm run web (or npx expo start --web --port 8081).
steps: In Cursor Agent, call generate_figma_design with outputMode: existingFile and fileKey above (each screen needs its own captureId).
Open each captureUrl in Chrome while the dev server is running; wait for Figma to finish importing (~2–5s after load).
Poll generate_figma_design with captureId until status is completed.

captures.name: Auth
captures.note: Clears saved session so the login screen shows.

captures.name: Home
captures.note: Seeds demo session and opens Home tab.
